[http://www.nvidia.com/content/global/global.php NVIDIA] |created= 2016-01-06 |disbanded= |trades= }}{{TOCRWI}} '''Chiefs Black''' are an Oceanic team. == History == '''Chiefs Black''' were formed in January 2016 as a sister team of [[The Chiefs eSports Club]], and qualified for the [[OCS/2016 Season/Split 1|Oceanic Challenger Series]] later that month.[http://chiefsesc.com/news/chiefs-black-ocs-team-recruiting-midsupport Chiefs Black OCS Team Recruiting Mid/Support] ''chiefsesc.com''[http://chiefsesc.com/news/chiefs-black-qualify-for-ocs Chiefs Black Qualify for OCS!] ''chiefsesc.com'' == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} ==Organization== ===Former=== {{listplayer/Start|staff=yes|newteam=yes}} {{listplayersp|Sangy|au|Frank Li|'''Founder/Owner'''|newteam=Chiefs}} {{listplayersp|BlindTurkey|au|Joshua Patrizi|'''Head Analyst'''|newteam=Tainted Minds}} {{listplayersp|Siri|au|Harrison Schaap|'''Manager'''|newteam=none}} {{listplayersp|Ottoke|au|Luke Knapp|'''Coach'''|newteam=none}} {{listplayer/End}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== ==See Also== ==External Links== ==References==
